meta.title: Systemic — CRM, Inventory, Finance & Shipping for Business
meta.description: Clients, appointments, orders, inventory, payroll, Nova Poshta, Meest Express, Telegram, Checkbox — all in one system. Try 7 days free.

hero.title: Run your business, not spreadsheets
hero.subtitle: CRM for salons, clinics & shops: calendar, checkout, inventory, finances, loyalty & delivery — from client booking to fiscal receipt, no extra tools needed.
hero.trustLine: Free trial · No credit card required · Start in 5 minutes

painPoints.title: Sound familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: This is what business owners deal with every day — until they automate it

items.title: Clients get lost between channels
items.description: Someone texted on Telegram, someone called, someone walked in without an appointment. No single database — no control.

items.title: Profit is a mystery
items.description: Money comes in and goes out, but how much you actually earn — unclear. Cash doesn't add up, payroll done on a calculator.

items.title: Inventory has a mind of its own
items.description: Product ran out — you find out from a client. Excel stock levels were outdated yesterday. Nobody tracks write-offs.

items.title: Routine instead of growth
items.description: Appointments in notebooks, waybills by hand, reminders from memory. 3 hours a day on what a system does in seconds.

features.title: Everything to manage your business — in one window
features.subtitle: No need for 10 subscriptions. Every module works with others — data complements, never duplicates.

items.title: Client Database
items.description: Full cards with visit, purchase and message history. Categories, tags, search by any field. Birthdays and notes.

items.title: Appointment Calendar
items.description: Convenient day planning. Multiple staff, services and locations. Recurring visits and automatic client reminders.

items.title: Orders & Shipping
items.description: From creation to delivery. Automatic waybill creation via Nova Poshta and Meest Express. Inventory write-off on shipment.

items.title: Inventory & Purchasing
items.description: Product catalog, stock levels per warehouse, purchases, stock movements. Automatic write-off on sales. Low stock alerts.

items.title: Real-time Finances
items.description: Transactions, cash register, financial results for any period. See your profit daily, not at month's end.

items.title: Payroll & Motivation
items.description: Service percentage, fixed rate, bonuses — any scheme. Automatic calculation per period. Motivate your team transparently.

items.title: Loyalty Programs
items.description: Bonus programs, point accumulation, coupons and promo codes. Clients come back more often.

items.title: Production
items.description: Tech cards (recipes), production orders, material consumption tracking. For cafes, kitchens, micro-productions.

items.title: Telegram, SMS, Email
items.description: Visit reminders, two-way messaging with clients via Telegram bot. SMS and email notifications.

items.title: Fiscal Receipts (Checkbox)
items.description: Checkbox fiscal register for creating fiscal receipts. Full compliance with Ukrainian law.

items.title: Roles & Access Control
items.description: Restrict access to specific modules. A specialist sees only their schedule, an admin — everything. Every action is logged.

showcases.title: Appointments, visits, returning clients — on autopilot
showcases.description: For salons, clinics, studios and anyone working with appointments. Client database with full history, calendar for planning, automatic reminders — clients show up on time, and you don't waste time on calls.
bullets: Appointment calendar with staff and location filters
Automatic reminders via Telegram, SMS, Email
Loyalty programs, coupons and bonuses for repeat visits

showcases.title: From order to 'Received' — without manual work
showcases.description: For online stores and marketplace sellers. Full order cycle: create → pack → waybill → ship → deliver. Inventory writes off automatically, waybill created in one click.
bullets: Automatic waybill creation (Nova Poshta, Meest Express)
Inventory with automatic write-off on shipment

showcases.title: Quick sale, inventory & fiscal receipt — in one window
showcases.description: For cafes, shops, showrooms. Quick POS sales, automatic inventory write-off, fiscal receipt via Checkbox. Tech cards for micro-productions — control ingredient costs.
bullets: POS sales with automatic inventory write-off
Tech cards and production orders for micro-productions

showcases.title: Know your profit — daily, not at month's end
showcases.description: Cash register, transactions, financial results, payroll — all calculated automatically. Business monitor shows key metrics in real time. Make decisions based on numbers, not intuition.
bullets: Automatic payroll calculation by motivation schemes
Business monitor with key KPIs in real time

howItWorks.title: Get started in 5 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to automate your business

steps.title: Sign up
steps.description: Create an account and set up your business: name, locations, services.

steps.title: Add your team
steps.description: Invite staff, configure roles and work schedules.

steps.title: Start working!
steps.description: Book clients, sell products, track finances. Everything in one place.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. All modules included.

items.name: Andriy M.
items.text: The Telegram bot is pure magic. Clients get reminders, and we see their responses right in the CRM.

items.name: Serhiy M.
items.text: Finally everything in one place. We used to keep records in notebooks and finances in Excel. Now I see the full picture in 5 minutes.

items.name: Iryna D.
items.text: Inventory and sales work flawlessly. We ship orders via Nova Poshta right from the system.

items.question: Do I need to install any software?
items.answer: No. Systemic works in the browser — on desktop, tablet and phone. Nothing to install.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes, every new account gets a 7-day free trial with full access to all modules. No credit card required.

items.question: What integrations are supported?
items.answer: Nova Poshta, Meest Express, Telegram bot, Checkbox (fiscal register), SMS and Email notifications. All integrations included in every plan.

items.question: Can I migrate data from another system?
items.answer: Yes, we'll help migrate your data from Excel or another CRM. Contact our support team.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, the responsive interface works on any device with a browser — smartphone, tablet, laptop.

items.question: Can I manage multiple locations?
items.answer: Yes, Systemic supports multi-location management. Each location has its own checkout, team, schedule and inventory, while the client database and loyalty programs are shared. Read the full guide →

items.question: How does access control work?
items.answer: You can restrict employee access to specific modules. For example, a specialist only sees their own schedule, not finances or the client database.

items.question: How many staff members can I add?
items.answer: Depends on the plan: Start — up to 2, Business — up to 5, Pro — up to 15 users.

cta.title: Stop juggling ten different tools
cta.subtitle: Try Systemic for free — after 7 days you won't want to go back to spreadsheets

terms.title: Terms of Service — Systemic CRM
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. These Terms of Service (hereinafter — "Terms") govern the relationship between LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK" (hereinafter — "Provider") and an individual or legal entity (hereinafter — "User") using the Systemic CRM cloud service (hereinafter — "Service"), available at https://app.systemic-crm.com.

1.2. By registering for the Service, the User fully and unconditionally accepts these Terms.

1.3. The Provider reserves the right to amend the Terms by notifying the User at least 14 days before the changes take effect, via email or an in-app notification.

2. Description of the Service

2.1. Systemic CRM is a cloud-based customer, appointment, finance, and staff management system for small and medium-sized businesses.

2.2. The Service is provided on a SaaS (Software as a Service) subscription basis.

2.3. The Provider continuously improves the Service and reserves the right to add, modify, or remove functionality without prior notice, provided such changes do not materially affect the core features of the User's paid plan.

3. Registration and Account

3.1. To use the Service, the User must create an account by providing a valid email address and business name.

3.2. The User is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their password and for all actions performed under their account.

3.3. The User must immediately notify the Provider of any unauthorized access to their account.

3.4. One account corresponds to one business (tenant). Creating multiple free accounts to circumvent plan limitations is prohibited.

4. Pricing Plans and Payment

4.1. The Service offers the following plans: Trial (7 days free), Start, Business, and Pro. Current pricing and feature lists are available on the pricing page within the Service.

4.2. Payments are processed monthly via the LiqPay payment system. Subscriptions renew automatically each month.

4.3. The User may cancel their subscription at any time. Access to the paid plan remains active until the end of the current billing period.

4.4. Systemic CRM is a digital service (SaaS) with immediate access upon payment. In accordance with applicable consumer protection laws, refunds for paid subscription periods are not available. Full details are provided on the Refund & Exchange page.

4.5. The Provider may change prices by giving the User at least 30 days' notice. New prices take effect from the next billing period.

5. User Rights and Obligations

5.1. The User has the right to:

  • use the Service in accordance with their paid plan;
  • export their data at any time;
  • delete their account and all associated data.

5.2. The User agrees to:

  • not use the Service for illegal activities;
  • not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' data;
  • not overload the Service with automated requests (scraping, DDoS);
  • not share account access with third parties without the Provider's consent.

6. Provider Rights and Obligations

6.1. The Provider undertakes to:

  • maintain Service availability of at least 99% per month (excluding scheduled maintenance);
  • maintain the confidentiality of User data;
  • provide at least 24 hours' notice of scheduled maintenance.

6.2. The Provider reserves the right to:

  • suspend User access in the event of a breach of these Terms;
  • suspend access in the event of non-payment after the paid period expires;
  • delete data of inactive free accounts 90 days after the trial period ends.

7. Limitation of Liability

7.1. The Service is provided "as is." The Provider does not guarantee that the Service will operate without interruption or error.

7.2. The Provider's maximum liability is limited to the amount paid by the User for the last 3 months of Service usage.

7.3. The Provider is not liable for:

  • data loss resulting from User actions;
  • outages caused by third parties (hosting provider, payment system, internet service provider);
  • indirect damages or lost profits.

8. Intellectual Property

8.1. All rights to the Service, its code, design, and trademarks belong to the Provider.

8.2. Data uploaded by the User remains the property of the User.

8.3. The Provider does not use User data for AI model training, analytics, or sale to third parties.

9. Termination

9.1. The User may stop using the Service at any time by deleting their account in the settings.

9.2. The Provider may terminate the User's access to the Service in the event of:

  • systematic breach of these Terms;
  • non-payment for 30 days after the paid period expires;
  • use of the Service for illegal activities.

9.3. Upon account deletion, all User data is removed within 30 days.

10. Dispute Resolution

10.1. All disputes shall be resolved through negotiation. If an agreement cannot be reached, disputes shall be settled in accordance with the applicable laws of Ukraine.

10.2. These Terms are governed by the laws of Ukraine.

11. Contact Information

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Systemic CRM
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. This Privacy Policy (hereinafter — "Policy") describes how LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK" (hereinafter — "Provider," "we") collects, uses, stores, and protects the personal data of users of the Systemic CRM service (hereinafter — "Service").

1.2. By using the Service, you agree to the terms of this Policy.

1.3. We comply with the requirements of the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Personal Data" and, when processing data of EU residents, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

2. Data We Collect

2.1. Data you provide during registration:

  • Email address
  • Password (stored in encrypted form in Firebase Authentication)
  • Business name
  • Contact person's name

2.2. Data you enter while using the Service:

  • Customer information (names, phone numbers, notes)
  • Appointments, orders, financial transactions
  • Staff data (names, contacts, schedules)
  • Integration settings (API keys are stored in encrypted form)

2.3. Data collected automatically:

  • IP address (for security and audit purposes)
  • Browser and device type
  • Error data (via Sentry — without personal data)

3. How We Use Your Data

3.1. Your data is used exclusively for:

  • Providing and improving the Service
  • Authentication and account security
  • Sending service notifications (payments, Service changes)
  • Technical support

3.2. We do NOT use your data for:

  • Selling or sharing with third parties
  • Marketing communications without your consent
  • Training artificial intelligence models
  • Profiling or targeted advertising

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1. Data is stored on Google Cloud Platform servers (Firebase/Firestore) in European data centers.

4.2. We apply the following security measures:

  • Data encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS)
  • Encryption of sensitive fields (API keys, integration passwords)
  • Authentication via Firebase Authentication
  • Data isolation between different businesses (tenants)
  • Regular backups
  • Audit logs of all changes

4.3. Access to the database is restricted to authorized technical personnel of the Provider.

5. Data Sharing with Third Parties

5.1. We use the following third-party services for the operation of the Service:

ServicePurposeData Received
Google FirebaseDatabase hosting, authenticationAll Service data
VercelWeb application and API hostingRequest logs (IP, URL)
LiqPayPayment processingEmail, payment amount
SentryError monitoringTechnical data (no PII)
ResendEmail notificationsRecipient email addresses

5.2. Each of these services has its own privacy policy and meets security standards.

5.3. We do not sell or share your data with any other third parties, except as required by law.

6. Third-Party Integrations

6.1. The Service supports integrations with Telegram, Nova Poshta, Checkbox, Rozetka, Prom.ua, and other services.

6.2. Data is shared with these services only at the User's initiative and only to the extent necessary for the integration to function.

6.3. API keys and passwords for integrations are stored in encrypted form and are never transmitted to the client device.

7. Your Rights

7.1. You have the right to:

  • Access — obtain a copy of all your data (via the "Export Data" feature in the Service)
  • Rectification — modify or update your data at any time
  • Erasure — delete your account and all associated data (via the "Delete Account" option in settings)
  • Restriction of processing — request suspension of your data processing
  • Portability — receive your data in a machine-readable format (JSON)

7.2. To exercise these rights, contact support@systemic-crm.com. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Cookies

8.1. The Service uses only technical cookies necessary for:

  • Maintaining an authenticated session (Firebase Auth)
  • Saving interface preferences (language, theme)

8.2. We do not use marketing, analytics, or advertising cookies.

9. Data Retention and Deletion

9.1. Data of active accounts is retained for the entire duration of Service usage.

9.2. After account deletion:

  • Database records are deleted within 30 days
  • Backups containing your data are deleted within 90 days
  • Error logs in Sentry are retained for 90 days
  • Server logs in Vercel are retained for 30 days

9.3. Data of inactive free accounts is deleted 90 days after the trial period ends.

10. Changes to This Policy

10.1. We may update this Policy. We will notify you of material changes via email or an in-app notification at least 14 days in advance.

10.2. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

11. Contact Information

For privacy and data protection inquiries:

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397

refund.title: Refund & Exchange Policy
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. Systemic CRM is a cloud-based service (SaaS) provided on a monthly subscription basis. Access to the Service is activated immediately upon payment.

1.2. This page describes the terms for refunds and exchange of services in accordance with applicable Ukrainian law and payment system requirements.

2. Nature of the Service

2.1. Systemic CRM is a digital service, not a physical product. Upon payment, the User immediately receives full access to the features of the selected plan for 1 (one) calendar month.

2.2. Since access is granted immediately and the service begins at the moment of payment, refunds for the paid period are not available, in accordance with Article 12 of the Ukrainian Consumer Protection Law.

3. Exchange of Services

3.1. Switching between plans is available at any time:

  • Upgrade — The User may switch to a higher plan by paying the difference. The new plan is activated immediately.
  • Downgrade — The User may cancel their current subscription. Access to the current plan is maintained until the end of the paid period, after which they can subscribe to a lower plan.

3.2. Exchange for a different type of service is not available, as Systemic CRM is the Provider's sole product.

4. Subscription Cancellation

4.1. The User may cancel their subscription at any time via the "My Plan" section in the Service.

4.2. After cancellation:

  • Access to the paid plan is maintained until the end of the current billing period.
  • Automatic renewal is stopped.
  • After the paid period expires, the account transitions to a free mode (with limitations).

4.3. Partial refunds for unused days of the paid period are not provided.

5. Free Trial

5.1. New users receive a free trial period of 7 days.

5.2. No charges are made during the trial period. The User can evaluate the Service's features and decide whether to subscribe without any financial risk.

5.3. The trial period is not subject to refund or exchange, as it is free of charge.

6. Exceptional Cases

6.1. The Provider may consider individual refund requests in the following cases:

  • Extended technical failure of the Service (more than 72 consecutive hours) that prevented usage.
  • Erroneous double charge.

6.2. To request a review, contact support@systemic-crm.com within 7 days of the issue occurring.

7. Contact Information

For refund and exchange inquiries:

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Guides and instructions for working with Systemic CRM

locations.title: Locations in Systemic CRM — Complete Guide
locations.description: How locations work: multi-site, checkout, warehouses, staff, reports
sections:
What is a location?

A location is your physical point of business: a beauty salon, clinic, shop, studio, or office. If you have one location, the system works automatically — no setup needed. If you have multiple locations, you can add them in settings and switch between them with one click.

How to add a new location?

Go to Settings → Locations → Add location. For each location you can specify:

  • Name (e.g. “Main salon”, “Downtown branch”)
  • Address
  • Phone number
  • Color (for visual distinction in the interface)
  • Legal name, tax ID, bank details (for documents)

At least one location always exists — “Main”. You can rename it but cannot delete it.

How to switch between locations?

If you have more than one location, a switcher appears in the sidebar — showing the current location name with a colored dot. Click it to open a list of all your locations. Select one — and all modules (calendar, orders, finances, checkout) will immediately show data for that specific location.

The system remembers your last selected location — you'll return to it on your next login.

If you only have one location, the switcher is hidden and everything works automatically.

What each location sees

Calendar & Appointments

Each appointment belongs to the location where it was created. When switching locations, you only see appointments for that specific location.

Orders

Orders also belong to a specific location. When creating an order, it's automatically linked to your current location.

Store (POS)

Each sale in the Store is recorded for the current location. Sales and returns history is displayed only for the selected location.

Finances

All payments, refunds, and financial operations are displayed for the current location.

Checkout (Checkbox PRRO)

Each location has its own connection to Checkbox:

  • Its own cash register license key
  • Its own cashier PIN code
  • Its own tax rates
  • Its own POS terminal (PayLink)

Checkout setup is done separately for each location. Switch to the desired location via the sidebar, open Checkbox PRRO, and enter the license key and PIN code for that specific location.

Cash register shifts are also separate — a shift opened at one location does not affect another.

If you set up Checkbox before the multi-location update, your existing settings will continue to work as a fallback until you configure each location separately.

What's shared across all locations?

Clients

The client database is shared across the entire business. A client added at one location is automatically available at all others.

Services

The service catalog is shared. You create a service once — it's available for booking at any location. Individual staff members can have custom prices or durations for the same service.

Products

The product catalog is also shared. You don't need to create the same product twice for different locations. However, stock levels depend on the warehouse — each warehouse is linked to its own location.

Loyalty Programs

Bonus points, discount tiers, coupons, and subscriptions work the same across all locations. If a client earned points at one location, they can use them at another.

Integration Settings

Connections to Nova Poshta, Telegram bot, SMS, and Email are configured once and work across the entire account.

How do warehouses and stock work?

Each warehouse is linked to a specific location. For example:

  • “Main warehouse” → Central salon
  • “Downtown warehouse” → Downtown branch

The product is the same (shampoo X), but its quantity at each warehouse is different. A sale in the Store deducts from the warehouse you selected. Transfers between warehouses allow you to move stock between locations.

How do staff members work?

By default, each staff member is displayed at all locations. This means a client can book them at any location.

If you have more than one location, the staff member's profile shows an option to restrict them to specific locations. For example, you can specify that stylist Anna works only at the central salon — then she won't appear in the calendar at other locations.

Schedules per location

The same staff member can have a different schedule at different locations. For example: at the central salon — Monday, Wednesday, Friday; downtown — Tuesday and Thursday. The system automatically accounts for this when booking.

Reports & Analytics

The Reports section has a location filter. You can:

  • View data for a specific location
  • View combined data across all locations

This allows you to compare revenue, workload, and efficiency across your different locations.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I move an appointment from one location to another?
No, appointments are linked to a location. If needed, cancel the appointment at one location and create a new one at another.

Can staff see data from other locations?
No. Everyone only sees the location they selected. The exception is the Reports section, where managers can view combined information across all locations.

What happens if I delete a location?
You can only delete a location that has no staff, warehouses, or orders attached. Move everything to another location first. At least one location must always exist.

Do I need a separate Checkbox (cash register) for each location?
Yes. Each location connects to its own cash register with a separate license key and cashier PIN code.

Do I need a separate POS terminal for each location?
Yes, if you use PayLink. Each location can have its own bank terminal — configured in the Checkbox PRRO section for the corresponding location.
